chat.disclaimer: Mira is an AI companion, not a replacement for professional help.
chat.chatEmptyDesc: Send a message to begin. I'll guide you through a cognitive behavioral therapy conversation.
chat.noSessionsDesc: Start a new CBT session to begin working through your thoughts with AI guidance.
chat.endSessionDesc: This will end the current CBT session and generate an analysis of your conversation. You won't be able to send more messages after ending.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.emptySubtitle: Start your first CBT session with Mira to begin tracking your mental health journey.
dashboard.noMoodData: No mood entries in this period
dashboard.noEmotionData: No emotion data in this period
dashboard.noSessionData: No session data in this period
dashboard.noInsight: Complete a CBT session to see personalized insights.
dashboard.defaultInsight: Each session helps you understand your patterns better. Keep going — progress builds step by step.
dashboard.noSessionsYet: No sessions yet. Start your first — Mira is waiting.
dashboard.analyticsSubtitle: Your mental health patterns over time

hero.title: Your AI companion between therapy sessions
hero.subtitle: Talk to Mira — an AI trained in CBT. Track your mood. Understand your patterns. Share progress with your therapist.
hero.chatMessage1: I've been feeling really overwhelmed this week.
hero.chatReply1: I hear you. Can you tell me more about what's been happening? Sometimes naming the feeling helps us understand it better.
hero.chatMessage2: It's like everything is too much at once.
hero.chatReply2: That sounds exhausting. Let's try to slow down together and look at one thing at a time.

stats.label1: of people with anxiety never receive treatment
stats.label2: average wait for first therapy appointment
stats.note: Between sessions, you're on your own. MindBridge changes that.

founder.quote: I built MindBridge because I needed it myself
founder.body1: Two years ago I started having panic attacks. I didn't understand what was happening — I just knew something was wrong. I found a therapist, and it helped. But between those weekly sessions, I was alone with my anxiety, with no tools and no support.
founder.body2: I kept thinking: what if AI could be there in those 6 days and 23 hours between sessions? Not to replace my therapist — but to help me track patterns, practice CBT techniques, and actually arrive at my next appointment with real data instead of "well, it was kind of a rough week."
founder.placeholder: Replace with your real story — this is a placeholder.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Share what's on your mind. Mira listens without judgment, asks the right questions, and guides you through CBT exercises.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Log your mood daily. Watch trends emerge. Understand what triggers your anxiety and what helps.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Your therapist sees AI-generated insights before each session — so you spend time healing, not catching up.

features.title: Everything you need between sessions
features.f1Desc: Structured cognitive behavioral therapy conversations, available any time of day or night.
features.f2Desc: Log how you feel and which emotions are present. See trends over days and weeks.
features.f3Desc: After every session: automatic analysis of emotions, thought patterns, and progress.
features.f4Desc: Your conversations stay between you and Mira. We never sell your data.

therapists.title: For therapists
therapists.subtitle: Understand your patients between sessions
therapists.body: Your patients talk to Mira between appointments. You get AI-generated insights before each session — so you can focus on what matters.
therapists.b1: See mood trends, anxiety and depression levels
therapists.b2: Get AI summaries — save 2+ hours per week
therapists.b3: Color-coded patient list: who needs attention now
therapists.b4: Generate detailed session reports in seconds

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.note: Save 33% with yearly billing. Message packs for extra flexibility.

cta.disclaimer: Mira is an AI companion trained in CBT techniques. She's here to support you between sessions — not to diagnose or treat. If you're in crisis, please call a crisis line or go to your nearest emergency room.
cta.title: Ready to start your journey?
cta.subtitle: Free to begin. No credit card required.

footer.crisis: If you're in crisis, please call your local emergency services.
footer.copyright: © 2025 MindBridge. Not a replacement for professional help.

settings.title: Settings
settings.name: Name
settings.googleAuth: Signed in with Google. Password is managed by your Google account.
settings.disconnectConfirm: Are you sure you want to disconnect from your therapist?
settings.deleteConfirmDescription: This will permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.

aboutMe.title: About Me
aboutMe.subtitle: Help Mira understand you better. This info is used in your AI sessions and shared with your therapist.
aboutMe.name: Name
aboutMe.healthDescription: Helps Mira provide more relevant support.
aboutMe.previousTherapyPlaceholder: e.g. 2 years of CBT with Dr. Smith
aboutMe.occupationPlaceholder: e.g. Software developer at a startup
aboutMe.relationshipsPlaceholder: e.g. In a relationship with Maria, 2 years
aboutMe.goals: What I want to work on
aboutMe.goalsPlaceholder: What would progress look like for you?
aboutMe.anythingElseDescription: Anything that doesn't fit above — preferences, context, things Mira should know.
aboutMe.anythingElsePlaceholder: e.g. I'm introverted and it takes me a while to open up.
aboutMe.privacyNotice: Shared with your therapist (if connected) and used by Mira
aboutMe.saved: Saved! Mira will use this in your next session.
aboutMe.whatMiraKnows: What Mira learned from your sessions

dossier.title: Patient Dossier
dossier.yourNotesDescription: Mira reads these at the start of each session. Guide her focus, set boundaries, give instructions.
dossier.notesPlaceholder:
e.g.
- Focus on assertiveness this week
- Don't explore childhood trauma yet
- Praise progress with panic attacks
dossier.notesSaved: Notes saved. Mira will use them next session.
dossier.empty: No data yet. Dossier will appear after the patient fills About Me or completes a session.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your journey
pricing.subtitlePatient: Choose the plan that fits your journey
pricing.subtitleTherapist: Bridge the gap between sessions with AI-powered insights
pricing.areYouTherapist: Are you a therapist? See therapist plans →
pricing.packsNeverExpire: Purchased packs never expire and work with any plan.
pricing.patientsGetStandard: Your patients get Standard plan (500 msg/mo) included free.
pricing.comingSoon: Payments coming soon! Join the waitlist.
pricing.checkoutError: Could not start checkout. Please try again.
pricing.faqMessageA: Each message you send to Mira counts as one message against your limit.
pricing.faqChangePlanA: Yes! Upgrade or downgrade anytime. Changes take effect immediately. If upgrading, you're charged the prorated difference.
pricing.faqRunOutQ: What happens when I run out of messages?
pricing.faqRunOutA: You can buy a message pack to continue immediately, or wait until your plan resets next month. Your data and sessions are never deleted.
pricing.faqPacksExpireA: No. Purchased message packs stay in your account until used, regardless of your subscription status.
pricing.faqSecurityA: Yes. All conversations are encrypted. We never sell your data. Your therapist only sees what you choose to share.
